cast.name: 丹尼尔·罗帕汀 Daniel Lopatin

this_title: NOBODY HERE: The Story of Vaporwave
introduction: Five years in the making, ‘Nobody Here’ traces the story of Vaporwave and its evolution into the internet’s most aesthetic and celebrated micro-genre - from its origins in obscure online communities to its emergence in the mainstream consciousness.‘Nobody Here’ is the definitive documentary on the genre, told through the voices of those who shaped it: the artists, the writers, the labels, and (most importantly) the fans. Featuring interviews with more than 50 key contributors from across the Vaporwave scene, the film explores the genre’s history and cultural impact - meme turned mainstream; washed down with an Arizona Iced Tea.This is the story of Vaporwave.
chinese_title: NOBODY HERE: The Story of Vaporwave
